notes:
**Fixes & polish**

- Fixed **column alignment** in the list views — the Mentions/Updated headers now
  line up with their values, and adding columns scrolls sideways instead of
  cramming or overlapping dates.
- **All Notes no longer has a per-row delete** — deleting is via Trash.
- **All Tags** now shows the Updated date; **Trash** no longer wraps the deleted
  date and keeps its Restore/Delete column aligned.
- The **Filter menu** shows the right sections (Has mentions · Edited this week ·
  Folders · Tags) with proper checkboxes; slightly larger text in the Sort, Filter
  and Columns menus.
